name: Fear Calibration
short_description: It's your first day and you're trapped in your school–or at least what seems to be of it. Through piecing together hints hidden across rooms, accessing your teachers' computers, and fixing what's broken, find your way out of the room... before they can catch you. This game should work on laptop.
detailed_description:
Fear Calibration requires a lot of critical thinking, trial and error, and patience. If you lack one of those, this may not be the game for you.

Do You Think You Can Escape This Madness?

The Unknowingverse: Fear Calibration is a first-person escape room horror game. Explore the various rooms of what seems to be your school, and complete the puzzles to make your way out alive. Read all emails, posters, and notes carefully, and listen to every word said, for you will need this information to make it out. Stay alert, as there may be monsters lurking in the hall that try to hunt you down.

The Roses Shall Burn.

What happened after Empire of Roses? What was Project Hellfire in the first place? Who are you, and where did you come from? Where did your parents go, namely, your father. Who really was he? Can you figure that all out before you get hunted down?

Is anything even real in the first place?

But first maybe focus on making it out alive.

Features

- 2D minigames
- Easter eggs and secrets
- Multiple endings
- And lots, and lots of jumpscares!

Compatibility

This game is designed to work on most non-gaming laptops. It should work for most MacOS versions, but does not work for MacOS Beta.
